queries.question: What is the content of online and classroom lessons taught by Emily Williams?
queries.sql:
SELECT Lessons.content 
FROM Lessons JOIN Curriculums ON Lessons.curriculumID = Curriculums.curriculumID JOIN Educators ON Educators.educatorID =  Curriculums.EducatorID
WHERE (Lessons.educationalMethod = 'Online Learning' OR Lessons.educationalMethod = 'Classroom Teaching') AND Educators.firstName = 'Emily' AND Educators.lastName = 'Williams'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?content WHERE {
  ?lessons a :Lessons .
  ?curriculums a :Curriculums .
  ?lessons p:hasCurriculums ?curriculums .
  ?educators a :Educators .
  ?curriculums p:hasEducators ?educators .
  ?lessons p:content ?content .
  ?lessons p:educationalMethod ?educationalmethod_w .
  ?lessons p:educationalMethod ?educationalmethod_w2 .
  ?educators p:firstName ?firstname_w .
  ?educators p:lastName ?lastname_w .
  FILTER(((((STR(?educationalmethod_w) = "Online Learning" || STR(?educationalmethod_w2) = "Classroom Teaching")) && STR(?firstname_w) = "Emily") && STR(?lastname_w) = "Williams"))
}

queries.question: Provide content for all the online learning lessons and also the content of classroom teaching lessons taught by Emily Williams.
queries.sql:
SELECT Lessons.content 
FROM Lessons JOIN Curriculums ON Lessons.curriculumID = Curriculums.curriculumID JOIN Educators ON Educators.educatorID =  Curriculums.EducatorID
WHERE Lessons.educationalMethod = 'Online Learning' OR Lessons.educationalMethod = 'Classroom Teaching' AND Educators.firstName = 'Emily' AND Educators.lastName = 'Williams'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?content WHERE {
  ?lessons a :Lessons .
  ?curriculums a :Curriculums .
  ?lessons p:hasCurriculums ?curriculums .
  ?educators a :Educators .
  ?curriculums p:hasEducators ?educators .
  ?lessons p:content ?content .
  ?lessons p:educationalMethod ?educationalmethod_w .
  ?lessons p:educationalMethod ?educationalmethod_w2 .
  ?educators p:firstName ?firstname_w .
  ?educators p:lastName ?lastname_w .
  FILTER((STR(?educationalmethod_w) = "Online Learning" || ((STR(?educationalmethod_w2) = "Classroom Teaching" && STR(?firstname_w) = "Emily") && STR(?lastname_w) = "Williams")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show the content of online lessons and classroom lessons taught by Emily Williams.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  high: { SELECT ?content WHERE {
  ?lessons a :Lessons .
  ?curriculums a :Curriculums .
  ?lessons p:hasCurriculums ?curriculums .
  ?educators a :Educators .
  ?curriculums p:hasEducators ?educators .
  ?lessons p:content ?content .
  ?lessons p:educationalMethod ?educationalmethod_w .
  ?lessons p:educationalMethod ?educationalmethod_w2 .
  ?educators p:firstName ?firstname_w .
  ?educators p:lastName ?lastname_w .
  FILTER(((((STR(?educationalmethod_w) = "Online Learning" || STR(?educationalmethod_w2) = "Classroom Teaching")) && STR(?firstname_w) = "Emily") && STR(?lastname_w) = "Williams"))
} }
  low: { SELECT ?content WHERE {
  ?lessons a :Lessons .
  ?curriculums a :Curriculums .
  ?lessons p:hasCurriculums ?curriculums .
  ?educators a :Educators .
  ?curriculums p:hasEducators ?educators .
  ?lessons p:content ?content .
  ?lessons p:educationalMethod ?educationalmethod_w .
  ?lessons p:educationalMethod ?educationalmethod_w2 .
  ?educators p:firstName ?firstname_w .
  ?educators p:lastName ?lastname_w .
  FILTER((STR(?educationalmethod_w) = "Online Learning" || ((STR(?educationalmethod_w2) = "Classroom Teaching" && STR(?firstname_w) = "Emily") && STR(?lastname_w) = "Williams")))
} }
}
